meta.source: v17.2 Public Release Hardening Edition based on the prior audited v17.1 baseline.
meta.notes: Public release hardening: regression-checked search, bilingual text, Masses-only default, Sunday/Vigil badges, trust wording, Help Center, PWA update/version flow, and mobile usability.
meta.coordinate_update: All 117 sites now have coordinates. 66 sites use existing coordinates; 51 sites use approximate locality-level coordinates pending exact church-door verification.
meta.directions_update: Approximate-coordinate directions now use a richer text query: site + town + parish label + region + Mauritius. Exact/verified coordinates still use latitude/longitude pins.
